ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_levels" (
  "memory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory level */,
  "memory_level" TEXT /* Name of the memory level (e.g., L1, L2, L3, Main Memory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory level */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the memory level in bytes */,
  "block_size" TEXT /* Block size of the memory level in bytes */,
  "associativity" TEXT /* Associativity of the memory level (e.g., direct-mapped, 2-way, 4-way) */,
  "line_size" TEXT /* Line size of the memory level in bytes */,
  "latency" TEXT /* Latency of the memory level in nanoseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "memory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory level */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., thit, tmiss, Capacity, Block size, Associativity) */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware configuration */,
  "revision" INTEGER /* Revision number to track changes over time */,
  "benchmark_tool" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark tool used to measure the metric */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment (e.g., operating system, temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_memory_id FOREIGN KEY ("memory_id") REFERENCES memory_levels ("memory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES hardware_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "hardware_version" TEXT /* Version of the hardware */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software or firmware */,
  "system_architecture" TEXT /* Description of the system architecture */,
  "performance_target" TEXT /* Target performance metrics for the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_metrics" (
  "config_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration-metric relationship */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware configuration */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric for the specific configuration */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded for the specific configuration */,
  "benchmark_tool" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark tool used to measure the metric */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment (e.g., operating system, temperature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES hardware_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, performance analyst, system architect) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing specific permissions for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
